allow: Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/dotfield dotfield--silver dotfield--fade-radial pagehero__dots/dotfield dotfield--fade-radial pagehero__dots/g' services.html about.html contact.html)
Bash(perl -0pi -e 's{}{}g' index.html services.html about.html contact.html)

Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/linear-gradient\\\(180deg, var\\\(--sky\\\) 0%, var\\\(--white\\\) 75%\\\)/var\(--grad-mist\)/g; s/linear-gradient\\\(180deg, var\\\(--sky\\\), var\\\(--white\\\)\\\)/var\(--grad-mist\)/g; s/linear-gradient\\\(105deg, var\\\(--sky\\\) 0%, var\\\(--white\\\) 70%\\\)/var\(--grad-mist\)/g; s/linear-gradient\\\(105deg, var\\\(--sky\\\), var\\\(--white\\\)\\\)/var\(--grad-mist\)/g;' styles.css)
Bash(git -c user.email="hello@capstonetech.net" -c user.name="Capstone" commit -q -m "Capstone site: multi-page, dark inner-page heroes, insights cards, services rework")

Bash(perl -0pi -e 's{<a class="card card--ink reveal" data-reveal data-reveal-delay="80" href="services\\.html#data-analytics">}{<a class="card card--sky reveal" data-reveal data-reveal-delay="80" href="services.html#data-analytics">}g' index.html)
